payloadAsciiStrings: First Battle
Clear the stage in 3 minutes to receive a bonus reward: Level  1 Infantryman Unit Card.
!cffffffThe enemy Knolls have low stats, but they can be threatening in groups. !c00ffffUse your hero!cffffff to eliminate them before they gather.
Buster Hunt
Defend your tower perfectly against enemy attacks to receive a bonus reward: 100 Gold.
!cffffffInfantrymen are incapable of fighting alone. !c00ffffAllocate at least!cffffff !c00ffff2 or more Infantrymen!cffffff at the same time for maximum results.
Seize Veril
Upgrade your population for 1 or more times while in the stage to receive a bonus reward: Level  1 Panzer Unit Card.
!cffffffTo deal with an army of enemies, !c00ffffyou must upgrade!cffffff !c00ffffyour population at the Tower menu!cffffff.
Into the Enemy Camp
Clear the stage without losing more than 10 units to receive a bonus reward: 200 Gold.
!cffffffThe enemy Short Hair is a fast, aggressive unit. !c00ffffUse Panzers with high Defense!cffffff !c00ffffto hold off Short Hairs!cffffff from advancing to your tower.
Arang's Challenge
Keep your hero alive throughout the stage to receive a bonus reward: 200 Cash. (Can be used to unlock an additional slot.)
!cffffffArang is a threatening attacker. !c00ffffUse Panzers!cffffff !c00ffffto protect Vincent!cffffff while fighting.
Seize Kaleck
Clear the stage in 3 minutes to receive a bonus reward: Level  1 Calvary Unit Card.
!cffffff!c00ffffProduce Panzers quickly!cffffff before the enemy approaches your tower.
Bittersweet Return
Upgrade your mana for 1 or more times while in the stage to receive a bonus reward: Level  1 Hunter Unit Card.
!cffffffYou can produce more advanced units at a higher Mana Level. !c00ffffUse the Tower menu!cffffff !c00ffffto upgrade your mana!cffffff.
Buster Retaliation
Clear the stage without losing more than 5 units to receive a bonus reward: 1000 Gold.
!cffffff!cff0005Minotaurs!cffffff boast !cff0005high Defense!cffffff. Deal with them using !c00ffffHunters!cffffff !c00ffffwith high Attack Strength!cffffff.
New Enemy
Clear the stage in 3 minutes to receive a bonus reward: Level  1 Spearman Unit Card.
!cffffffTo deal with a variety of enemy units, !c00ffffdefend with Panzers!cffffff  and !c00ffffattack with Hunters!cffffff  for smooth combat.
Reclaim Iron
Keep your hero alive throughout the stage to receive a bonus reward: Level  1 Thief Unit Card.

!cffffff!cff0005Arbalests!cffffff inflicts piercing damage !cff0005on multiple targets!cffffff.  Make sure to eliminate them!cffffff using !c00ffffthe area-effective Spearmen!cffffff before their number increases.
Road to Lydia
Upgrade your mana for 2 or more times while in the stage to receive a bonus reward: 200 Cash.
!cffffffAre your units too weak? Use Gold or Cash and upgrade your units for enhanced powers.
Surrounding Enemies
Upgrade your Attack/Defense for 1 or more times while in the stage to receive a bonus reward: Level  1 Rider Unit Card.
!cffffffIt is difficult to deal with multiple enemies using only the default slots. !c00ffffExtend your slots!cffffff for smoother gameplay.
Reclaim Lydia
Defend your tower perfectly against enemy attacks to receive a bonus reward: 200 Cash.
!cffffffIf you have a hard time clearing a stage, use !c00ffffitems!cffffff.  You can also try to change the !c00ffffskills!cffffff of your hero.
Evacuate the Palace
Clear the stage without losing more than 10 units to receive a bonus reward: Level  1 Artillery Unit Card.
!cffffffUse !c00ffffPanzers!cffffff to hold off the enemy !cff0005horsemen!cffffff while attacking their !cff0005hunters!cffffff with your !c00ffffhorsemen!cffffff.
To the Free Trade Harbor
Clear the stage in 3 minutes to receive a bonus reward: 100 Cash.
!cffffff!cff0005Cavalry and Riders!cffffff boast a !cff0005high Movement Speed!cffffff.  Beware of a possible raid.
Persistent Pursuers
Keep your hero alive throughout the stage to receive a bonus reward: Level  1 Medic Unit Card.
!cffffff!cff0005Thieves!cffffff can steal mana, but they are vulnerable to melee attacks.  Use them to!c00ffff eliminate the enemy units quickly!cffffff before they do.
Hindsight
Clear the stage without losing more than 10 units to receive a bonus reward: 2000 Gold.
!cffffffPosition !c00ffffMedics!cffffff right behind !c00ffffPanzers!cffffff to keep them alive for a longer duration.
Defend the Free Trade Harbor
Defend your tower perfectly against enemy attacks to receive a bonus reward: Level  1 Glider Unit Card.
!cffffffDeal with the enemy !cff0005pairs of Panzer and Medic!cffffff using !c00ffffArtillery!cffffff units.
The Mysterious Elven
Clear the stage without using aerial units to receive a bonus reward: 100 Cash.
!cffffffUse !c00ffffArtillery!cffffff units to attack the enemy while keeping !cff0005Sword Masters!cffffff at bay.
Purpose of the Elven
Clear the stage in 3 minutes to receive a bonus reward: Level  1 Shielder Unit Card.

!cffffffThe enemy !cff0005Casters!cffffff use magic to !cff0005attack your long-ranged/support!cffffff !cff0005units!cffffff. Make sure to guard your !c00ffffMedics and Artillery!cffffff units from their attacks.
Meeting with Juno
Clear the stage without using aerial units to receive a bonus reward: 100 Cash.
Meaningless War
Defend your tower perfectly against enemy attacks to receive a bonus reward: Level  1 Gun Cavalry Unit Card.
